---
title: "About Me"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: cerulean
---

### My academic and professional experience



#### Education
School: Cornell University<br/> Degree: Bachelor of Science<br/> Major: Biological Sciences, Neurobiology and Behavior 


School: Concord Academy<br/> Degree: High School

#### Work Experience
Icahn School of Medicine at Mount Sinai, May 2019 - June 2020<br/>
Position: Medical Researcher 


Cornell Cooperative Extension, May 2017 - July 2018<br/>
Position: Administrative Program Assistant


#### Research Experience

Computational Physiology Laboratory, May 2016 - May 2018<br/>
Cornell University, Department of Neurobiology and Behavior


The Emmnanuel Pothos Laboratory, June 2013 - August 2013<br/>
Tufts University School of Medicine, Department of Neuroscience
